title: create-loop command manifest
description: Declares the canonical create-loop slash commands. Host-specific command files are rendered from these entries by bin/create-loop.js.

id.description: Command slug. Becomes /<id> in the host and the rendered filename <id>.md.

body.description: Path (relative to command/) to the frontmatter-free command body. Shared verbatim across every host.

description.description: One-line command description; rendered into each host's frontmatter.

argumentHint.description: Optional argument hint. Rendered as `argument-hint` (Claude Code) where the host supports it.
